channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: À moins de 9 000 euros, cette nouvelle voiture électrique chinoise a tout pour détruire le marché européen
item.description: C'est en Chine, mais regardez ces chiffres. Pour le prix d'une petite occasion fatiguée chez nous, Chery propose une voiture neuve avec 420 km d'autonomie (CLTC) et une puce Snapdragon avec un grand écran central.

item.title: Asus routers hijacked to power dangerous cybercrime proxy network - here's what we know
item.description: KadNap is being used to create Doppelgänger, a network with 14,000+ devices targeting Asus routers.

item.title: I've said it before, and I'm saying it again — do not overlook this underrated gaming audio accessory that can transform and hugely enhance your setup
item.description: External sound cards are a supremely underrated gaming accessory that can enhance your experience immensely - and one of my favorites is discounted right now.

item.title: I switched from a cordless vac to corded, and I'll never go back — here are 4 models I recommend buying at Amazon's spring sale
item.description: I've started valuing the power over the convenience of a cordless vac, especially since I started cleaning carpets more often

item.title: PS Plus Extra et Premium en mars 2026 : Warhammer 40,000, Persona, Blasphemous, Tekken… Voici les jeux offerts ce mois-ci
item.description: Les jeux offerts aux abonnés Extra et Premium du PlayStation Plus viennent de tomber ! Entre une plongée dans le vaste univers de Warhammer 40,000, le dernier chapitre de Persona ou exploration des mines de la Moria, qu'est-ce qui vous parle le plus ?

item.title: Amazon dans le rétro : cette borne d’arcade Sega Astro City avec ses 22 jeux et son écran vertical est à -38% pour les Ventes Flash de Printemps
item.description: La Sega Astro City Mini V est une borne d'arcade de bureau à écran vertical (d'où le V) centrée sur les shmups et comprenant 22 jeux à découvrir pour 104,97 euros au lieu de 169,99 euros.

item.title: ‘There’s no going back’ — still thinking of quitting ChatGPT? Make sure you do these 3 things first
item.description: People quitting ChatGPT after OpenAI’s Pentagon deal should export their data, copy their memories, and delete their chats before closing their account.

item.title: ‘Chainsaw Man’ Fans Are Freaking Out That the Manga Might Be Suddenly Over
item.description: Fan theories are abound, thanks to contrasting versions of the latest chapter of 'Chainsaw Man' and its final page.

item.title: Claude is down for many — here's what we know as Anthropic says it's 'investigating' an issue
item.description: Having Claude issues? You're not alone — Anthropic says it's investigating an "active issue".

item.title: Business landscape is about to undergo a seismic transformation driven by AI agents
item.description: AI agents are evolving. We are now advancing towards autonomous AI agents.

item.title: EV startup Harbinger reveals a smaller work truck with electric and hybrid variants
item.description: The LA-based startup is trying to corner the commercial truck market with its electric and hybrid trucks that offer a lower cost of ownership and a better driving experience.

item.title: Rabbit's Cyberdeck is a modern take on a netbook
item.description: When you think of an AI-forward PC, you might think of something like NVIDIA's $3,999 DGX Spark — a computer with enough computing power to run complex large language models locally. That's not what Rabbit is trying to build with Project Cyberdeck. Instead, the company's goal is to produce a device tailored for vibe coding, and Engadget was given an exclusive first look at the upcoming PC. Rabbit began working on Project Cyberdeck after the company's CEO, Jesse Lyu, saw how much his software engineers were using Claude Code. Lyu thought a small form factor PC, like the netbooks that were popul...

item.title: Samsung cache une nouveauté matérielle majeure dans l’appareil photo du Galaxy S26 Ultra
item.description: Le dernier fleuron de la marque sud-coréenne n'a pas tout misé sur son écran « anti-espion » ou l'IA. Les premiers démontages de l'appareil révèlent l'intégration discrète d'une technologie optique inédite baptisée ALoP qui bouleverse totalement le fonctionnement de son puissant zoom.

item.title: The rise of the silver collar workforce
item.description: The future of industry depends on responsible human-machine collaboration.

item.title: « Les processeurs Intel de bureau les plus rapides jamais conçus pour le jeu » : les Intel Core Ultra 250K Plus et 270K Plus sont là
item.description: Intel annonce la sortie imminente de deux nouveaux processeurs spécialement conçus pour le jeu. Que promettent les Intel Core Ultra 250K Plus et 270K Plus ?

item.title: MacBook Neo 2 : Apple prépare déjà le prochain modèle, et il y a une mauvaise nouvelle
item.description: Alors que le tout premier MacBook Neo bouscule actuellement le marché des PC portables abordables, la chaîne d'approvisionnement regarde déjà vers l'horizon. Le très bien informé Ming-Chi Kuo vient de lâcher ses dernières prédictions : abandon du tactile pour l'entrée de gamme, calendrier à rallonge pour l'OLED et ajustement des chiffres de ventes. ...

item.title: Meta didn’t buy Moltbook for bots — it bought into the agentic web
item.description: Meta’s Moltbook acquisition may look odd at first, but the deal could signal how Meta sees AI agents shaping future advertising and commerce on an agentic web.

item.title: Pourquoi cette nouvelle usine XXL à Dunkerque est vitale pour l’avenir de la voiture électrique en Europe
item.description: Orano et le groupe chinois XTC New Energy ont annoncé la construction d'une usine de matériaux dédiés aux cathodes des batteries pour voitures électriques à Dunkerque, au coeur même de la "Vallée de la batterie".

item.title: Canva’s new editing tool adds layers to AI-generated designs
item.description: Canva introduced a new feature that separates flat image files and AI-generated visuals into layered, fully editable designs. The Magic Layers tool is launching in public beta today in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia, allowing design components like objects, text boxes, and other graphics to be selected individually while preserving the original layout. "After […]...

item.title: 6 Freaky Particles That Could Fix Physics—If They Exist
item.description: The magnum opus of particle physics is far from complete, requiring physicists to devise many alternatives—some weirder than others.

item.title: This Is the Next Wave of Political Fundraising
item.description: In Discord servers and Instagram DMs, content creators are organizing, turning followings in the millions into millions of dollars in political giving.

item.title: WhatsApp is launching parent-linked accounts for pre-teens
item.description: WhatsApp is rolling out parent-managed accounts for under-13 users, limiting features to messaging and calls while giving parents PIN-protected controls, alerts, and approval over contacts and groups.

item.title: Les écouteurs Samsung Galaxy Buds 4 et Buds 4 Pro sont disponibles dès aujourd’hui en France
item.description: Les nouveaux écouteurs sans fil Galaxy Buds 4 et Buds 4 Pro arrivent ce 11 mars 2026 en France à partir de 179 euros pour le modèle standard et 249 euros pour les Pro.

item.title: Larry 'Major Nelson' Hryb joins Commodore to help build its community
item.description: Phil Spencer leaving his long-held role at Xbox might have made all the headlines last month, but a few years ago the big story was company veteran Larry "Major Nelson" Hryb’s departure from Microsoft. Hryb recently seemingly hinted at a return to the company at which he spent more than two decades, but he’s now landed at Commodore instead. The ex-Xbox icon joins the recently revived 80s computer brand as a Community Development Advisor, where his job will be to "help support and expand the global community," Commodore said in a press release. Hryb, who was the public face of Xbox during the b...

item.title: Le Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge (512 Go), le plus fin du catalogue de la marque, s’allège de 500 € en pleines ventes flash d’Amazon
item.description: Dévoilé l'an dernier, le Samsung Galaxy S25 Edge présente une épatante finesse de 5,8 mm, tout en affichant un prix très élitiste. Heureusement, pendant les ventes flash de printemps d'Amazon, on peut trouver sa version 512 Go à 869 euros au lieu de 1 369 euros.

item.title: Violent Storms Brought Tornadoes and Monster Hail to the Midwest. Now They’re Tracking East
item.description: Supercell thunderstorms and tornadoes brought devastation to several central states earlier this week, and the danger is far from over.

item.title: Il a poussé le MacBook Neo à bout avec du montage en 6K et de l’édition de RAW 100 Mpx
item.description: Le MacBook Neo à 699 € n'est-il qu'un iPad déguisé ? C'est le débat qui agite le monde la tech depuis son lancement. Mais quand on commence à ouvrir Final Cut Pro ou Lightroom pour y jeter des fichiers lourds... qu'est-ce que ça donne ?

item.title: Amazon expands a program that lets customers shop from other retailers’ sites
item.description: The changes allow more merchants to participate in Amazon's Shop Direct program, which sends Amazon customers to other retailers' websites.

item.title: Sur TV, YouTube diffuse des publicités de 30 secondes impossibles à passer
item.description: L'incitation à payer un abonnement YouTube Premium continue. Un nouveau format publicitaire obligatoire débarque sur YouTube pour Google TV.

item.title: Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal FREE Streams: How to watch Champions League 2025/26 Round of 16 1st leg from anywhere
item.description: All the ways to watch Bayer Leverkusen vs Arsenal live streams from anywhere for free, as the Gunners visit the BayArena in the Champions League Round of 16.

item.title: « On est tous en passe de devenir des chauffeurs Deliveroo », estime l’ancien ambassadeur du Numérique pour la France
item.description: L'ancien directeur du Numérique de l'État Henri Verdier, aujourd'hui à la tête de la fondation Inria, était auditionné à l'Assemblée nationale mardi 10 mars, dans le cadre de la commission d'enquête qui veut dresser l’état des lieux de nos faiblesses en matière digitale. L'ex-ambassadeur du Numérique pour la France a avancé des pistes pour atteindre une « autonomie stratégique », dont l'adoption « d'une politique affirmée de soutien aux logiciels libres, des facteurs de souveraineté »....

item.title: Meta rolls out new scam detection tools to Facebook, WhatsApp, and Messenger
item.description: The tech giant says the new features are designed to alert users before they engage with something suspicious.

item.title: Sonos’ New Bluetooth Speaker Could Put Bose in Its Place
item.description: There's also a new cheaper option to the Sonos Era 100.

item.title: My top half-price earbuds in Amazon's Spring Deal Days? Easy, the 5-star Nothing Ear (a) — now just £49.99!
item.description: Most of the earbuds deals I've seen in the Spring Deal Days sales are fine rather than fantastic — but Nothing's Ear (a) at this new lowest-seen price are a no-brainer

item.title: Offload your cleaning tasks to the Dreame Matrix10 Ultra robot vacuum and mop for its lowest price yet
item.description: As of March 11, get the Dreame Matrix10 Ultra robot vacuum and mop for its lowest price yet.

item.title: Budget TV deal: Amazon has a 55-inch QLED 4K Samsung TV for less than $380
item.description: The budget-friendly Samsung 55-inch Q7F QLED 4K TV is on sale at Amazon for only $377.99, nearly 30% off its list price.

item.title: How to ditch Ring’s surveillance network
item.description: Recently, Ring ran a Super Bowl ad for its Search Party feature showing how it uses AI to scan footage from Ring cameras and video doorbells to help find lost dogs. It sounds neighborly — until you consider that the same system could theoretically search footage for anything or anyone. Combined with longstanding concerns around […]

item.title: You can’t replace the battery in Lego’s Smart Bricks — and many of its sensors aren’t available yet
item.description: The first Lego Smart Brick sets, based on Star Wars, aren't quite what my kids and I hoped, and I suspect much of that's down to programming. But the Smart Bricks may also have some technical limitations out of the gate. The first sets don't ship with a number of their sensors enabled, including the […]

item.title: Lucid Motors ships Apple CarPlay and Android Auto to Gravity SUV owners
item.description: The update comes after a rocky first few months of software problems on the electric SUV.

item.title: Godzilla Minus One, a very good movie, is $15 on 4K Blu-ray
item.description: I love Godzilla Minus One. Granted, it’s only the second Godzilla movie that I’ve watched, the other being 1998’s terrible Godzilla featuring Matthew Broderick (the soundtrack has bangers, though). While I may not exactly be an expert, this is a good movie, whether you’re a first-time Godzilla viewer or a longtime kaiju fan. If you’ve […]

item.title: This 'perfect everyday cleaner' from Shark is ideal for your spring cleaning plans — and it’s 25% off at Amazon
item.description: The Shark Clean & Empty Cordless Vacuum Cleaner means you can clean up your home for less and with ease — and it's on sale now at Amazon.

item.title: MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac mini… quels sont les meilleurs MacBook et Mac de bureau en mars 2026 ?
item.description: Il existe plusieurs gammes d'ordinateurs Apple : MacBook, iMac, Mac Studio. Vous ne savez pas quel Mac choisir ? On fait le point pour vous aider à choisir le meilleur MacBook (ou bien le Mac fixe) qui vous convient le mieux.

item.title: ‘Rick and Morty’ Returns This May, Promises ‘Grade A Organic Slop’
item.description: Season 9 of the iconic Adult Swim series is making a comeback promise: no AI, just the regular weirdness.

item.title: Popeyes restaurant closures: See the updated list of doomed locations from a major franchisee
item.description: After seeking Chapter 11 protection, Florida-based Sailormen Inc. has revealed in a new court filing that additional Popeyes stores have shuttered for good. The hits keep coming for fans of Popeyes Louisiana Kitchen.

item.title: L’hémorragie continue chez Volkswagen : 50 000 emplois vont être supprimés sur l’ensemble du groupe
item.description: Le groupe Volkswagen continue de trancher dans le vif et vient d'officialiser l'ampleur de ses suppressions de postes en Allemagne, avec 50 000 emplois menacés. Dans le même temps, le groupe se restructure et recentralise certaines de ses activités.

item.title: Meta Is Developing 4 New Chips to Power Its AI and Recommendation Systems
item.description: The MTIA processors are the tech giant’s latest attempt to build its own AI hardware, even as it continues spending billions on gear from industry leaders like Nvidia.

item.title: Amazon just dropped the price of the M5 MacBook Pro
item.description: As of March 11, you can get the Apple MacBook Pro (M5, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD) for $1,399.99 at Amazon, down from $1,599.

item.title: Le sens du timing : comment AMD profite de la grande conférence de Nvidia pour faire du pied aux géants coréens
item.description: Pour la première fois depuis son entrée en fonction, Lisa Su se rendra en Corée pour s'entretenir avec plusieurs ténors de l'industrie tech locale. L'idée ? Renforcer des partenariats sur l'IA et les datacenters à un moment bien particulier, car ce voyage est prévu pile durant la GTC... d'un certain Nvidia.

item.title: The all-new iPad Air M4 is officially available to order today — and Amazon already has an impressive $40 discount
item.description: The all-new iPad Air M4 is officially available to order, and Amazon already has an impressive $40 discount, which is the best deal you can find.

item.title: Amazon is making even senior engineers get code signed off following multiple recent outages
item.description: Even senior developers have been asked to get manager sign-off to prevent AI-generated errors affecting Amazon services.

item.title: Les Ventes Flash d’Amazon font repasser le prix de ce SSD Samsung 9100 Pro 8 To à un tarif raisonnable
item.description: Si vous êtes en quête d'un SSD performant, rapide avec une capacité de stockage généreuse, le Samsung 9100 Pro 8 To est affiché à 899,99 euros au lieu de 1 099,99 euros pendant les Ventes Flash de Printemps 2026.

item.title: How to watch Pokémon online for free
item.description: How to watch Pokémon for free. Stream Pokémon for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Crise de la RAM : après la mémoire, la pénurie de processeurs menace
item.description: Les barrettes de RAM ne sont plus les seules denrées rares du monde de l'informatique. Les processeurs commencent aussi à manquer.

item.title: Avec le MacBook Neo, Apple est prête à profiter de la crise de la mémoire
item.description: Ce mercredi 11 mars est un jour chargé pour Apple : toutes les nouveautés annoncées la semaine dernière sont en effet commercialisés aujourd'hui ! On attend surtout des nouvelles du MacBook Neo, le portable inédit à 699 €. Qu'on se rassure, elles devraient être bonnes (pour les finances d'Apple).

item.title: I was interviewed by an AI bot for a job
item.description: Millions of people are on the job hunt right now - and for many people, landing a job in the AI era feels more intimidating than ever. That's why the onset of AI avatars running your job interview via one-on-one video call, asking you questions, and analyzing how well you respond has generated a lot […]

item.title: Tembo is a playful drum machine that thinks it’s a checkerboard
item.description: Tembo looks like a toy, but one of those bougie wooden toys you get on Crate & Kids, not some cheap plastic garbage. Despite its appearance, it is a fully functional drum machine and sampler. Rather than a bunch of buttons and a screen, you build beats on Tembo by placing what are essentially wooden […]

item.title: Former Apple engineer raises $5M for a note-taking pendant that only records your voice
item.description: Taya is trying to address privacy concerns around note-taking wearables with its device that can be worn as a pendant and records only the user's voice.

item.title: Canopii looks to succeed where past indoor farms have not
item.description: Canopii's robotic farms can autonomously grow 40,000 pounds of herbs and leafy greens a year while being the size of a basketball court.

item.title: The Fast Company Grill returns to SXSW in Austin
item.description: The 13th annual Fast Company Grill hits SXSW in Austin this March 13-16—and trust us: it’s bigger and better than ever. Fast Company will be back in Austin, Texas this March 13–16 for its 13th annual Fast Company Grill at South by Southwest.
